---
title: "About Me"
---

## Professional Background

*[Provide a brief overview of your professional background, current studies, and career aspirations.]*

## Education

*[List your education history, including your current programme at DCU.]*

- **Dublin City University** — *Your Programme Name* (Expected Graduation: Year)

## Skills

*[List your key skills, both technical and soft skills.]*

- **Technical**: Python, SQL, Data Analysis, HTML/CSS, Git & GitHub
- **Business**: Financial Analysis, Data-Driven Decision Making, Project Management

## Interests

*[Describe your professional and personal interests.]*

---

## Curriculum Vitae

You can download my CV below or access it anytime from the navigation bar.

[Download CV (PDF)](assets/cv.pdf){.btn .btn-primary target="_blank"}
